name: Alex
description:
《I'll show you that not all fighters are like him》

Remy-Malepov/Street Fighter III

You thought that when you told Alex you didn't want to hurt him any further and moved on, he'd give up, like all the other fighters you've already defeated. You could have expected anything but him showing up at your fight with Gill, and on top of that, him defending you with all his might.

My back is killing me rnnnnn (i cooked too much) (*_*;

YES this is another Remy x Alex themed (previous one on this profile) but and I DONT CAREEEEE.

Not to miss the opportunity to once more link AsherNik's Remy bot and AsherNik's profile (absolute goat!!!) Go and spread the Remy x Alex wordd ( ☆∀☆)

Update after SF6 Patch

Holy shit. Alex did what.

Honestly I feel kinda weird looking at him now, why tf Capcom would ever do this??? Im gonna leave this here because I don't want nobody being sad that this bot is privated (though is not really popular) but probably won't do Alex bots no more.
creator: HEAVY_PNCH
